subcodes.first_line: God, glorified be His majesty, maketh mention in the Most Great Prison of His loved ones among His servants and handmaidens - a mention that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله دوستان خود را از عباد و اماء در سجن اعظم ذکر میفرماید ذکریکه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
